sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The white diamond moved to [49, 30] where the purple square was. Now I need to check if there are more targets or if the dark gray diamond at [59, 27] is the next/last one. Let me inspect and then click on it.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] < 100 and n['color'] not in ['g', 'B']:
        center = None
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] in ['W', 'G', 'M']:
            print(f"Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center={center}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
